title.en: Fastener Storage and Handling Guide: Prevent Damage and Corrosion
title.zh: 紧固件存储和处理指南：防止损坏和腐蚀
title.es: Guía de Almacenamiento y Manipulación de Sujetadores: Prevenga Daños y Corrosión
title.ar: دليل تخزين المنفصلات والمناولة: منع التلف والتآكل
title.fr: Guide de Stockage et de Manutention des Fixations: Prévenir les Dommages et la Corrosion
title.pt: Guia de Armazenamento e Manuseio de Fixadores: Prevenir Danos e Corrosão
title.ru: Руководство по Хранению и Обращению с Крепежом: Предотвращение Повреждений и Коррозии
title.ja: ファスナー保管と取り扱いガイド：損傷と腐食の防止
title.de: Fastener Lagerung und Handhabung: Schäden und Korrosion Verhindern
title.hi: फास्टनर भंडारण और हैंडलिंग गाइड: नुकसान और संक्षारण रोकें

description.en: Complete guide to fastener storage and handling. Learn proper storage conditions, handling procedures, and packaging methods to prevent fastener damage and corrosion.
description.zh: 紧固件存储和处理完整指南。了解正确的储存条件、处理程序和包装方法，以防止紧固件损坏和腐蚀。
description.es: Guía completa de almacenamiento y manipulación de sujetadores. Aprenda condiciones de almacenamiento adecuadas, procedimientos de manipulación y métodos de embalaje.
description.ar: دليل شامل لتخزين المنفصلات والمناولة. تعلم ظروف التخزين المناسبة وإجراءات المناولة وطرق التعبئة.
description.fr: Guide complet de stockage et de manutention des fixations. Apprenez les conditions de stockage appropriées, les procédures de manutention et les méthodes d'emballage.
description.pt: Guia completo de armazenamento e manuseio de fixadores. Aprenda condições de armazenamento adequadas, procedimentos de manuseio e métodos de embalagem.
description.ru: Полное руководство по хранению и обработке крепежа. Узнайте правильные условия хранения, процедуры обработки и методы упаковки.
description.ja: ファスナー保管と取り扱いの完全ガイド。適切な保管条件、取り扱い手順、梱包方法を学び、損傷と腐食を防ぎます。
description.de: Vollständiger Leitfaden für Fastener Lagerung und Handhabung. Lernen Sie ordnungsgemäße Lagerbedingungen, Handhabungsverfahren und Verpackungsmethoden.
description.hi: फास्टनर भंडारण और हैंडलिंग की पूर्ण गाइड। उचित भंडारण स्थितियां, हैंडलिंग प्रक्रियाओं, और पैकेजिंग विधियों के बारे में जानें।

keywords: fastener storage, fastener handling, prevent corrosion, storage conditions, fastener packaging

body.en:
Proper storage prevents fastener damage:

Environment:
- Indoor storage preferred
- Dry, ventilated area
- Temperature: 15-25°C ideal
- Relative humidity: Below 60%

Avoid:
- Direct sunlight (UV degradation)
- Moisture condensation
- Chemical exposure
- Dust and debris

Shelving:
- Use clean, dry shelves
- Metal shelving OK if coated
- Avoid concrete direct contact
- Organize by type and size

Proper packaging protects fasteners:

VCI (Vapor Corrosion Inhibitor):
- VCI paper interleaved between fasteners
- VCI bags for individual packages
- Protects against humidity and moisture
- Essential for overseas shipping

Desiccants:
- Silica gel packets in packages
- Absorbs moisture in sealed packages
- Replace when saturated

Original Packaging:
- Keep fasteners in original packaging when possible
- Manufacturer packaging designed for protection
- Label clearly with specifications

Proper handling prevents damage:

Do:
- Use clean gloves when handling
- Keep work area clean
- Return unused fasteners to clean storage
- Check condition before use
- Use FIFO (First In, First Out)

Don't:
- Drop containers (damages threads)
- Mix different sizes/types
- Use damaged fasteners
- Stack heavy containers on top
- Drag fasteners across surfaces
